mapper.select: SELECT v.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_vm.code_label AS voc_master_cd_nm, cd_vd.code_label AS voc_detail_cd_nm FROM sy_voc v LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = v.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vm ON cd_vm.code_grp = 'VOC_MASTER' AND cd_vm.code_value = v.voc_master_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vd ON cd_vd.code_grp = 'VOC_DETAIL' AND cd_vd.code_value = v.voc_detail_cd WHERE v.voc_id = #{id}
